title: Former Tesla exec and Heron Power CEO Drew Baglino has founded a heat pump startup
summary: Drew Baglino, formerly of Tesla and Heron Power, has founded Sadi Thermal Machines, his second startup since departing Tesla in 2024. The company focuses on heat pump technology as part of the growing clean energy sector.
content: Sadi Thermal Machines is Drew Baglino's second startup since leaving Tesla in 2024.

zh.title: 前特斯拉高管、赫龙动力首席执行官德鲁·巴格利诺创办了一家热泵初创公司
zh.summary: 德鲁·巴格利诺曾任职于特斯拉和赫龙动力公司，自2024年离开特斯拉后创办了他的第二家初创公司Sadi Thermal Machines。该公司专注于热泵技术，是清洁能源部门增长的一部分。

title: Musk mulled handing OpenAI to his children, Altman testifies
summary: During testimony in Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI, CEO Sam Altman revealed that Musk once considered transferring the company to his children. Altman characterized the conversation as "particularly hair-raising."
content: OpenAI's CEO recalls a "particularly hair-raising" conversation with the SpaceX founder.

zh.title: 马斯克考虑将OpenAI交给他的孩子，阿尔特曼作证
zh.summary: 在马斯克对OpenAI的诉讼中作证时，首席执行官萨姆·阿尔特曼透露，马斯克曾考虑将该公司转让给他的孩子。阿尔特曼将这次对话描述为"特别令人震惊的"。

title: Anthropic warns investors against secondary platforms offering access to its shares
summary: Anthropic has warned investors to avoid eight unauthorized secondary platforms—including Open Doors Partners, Unicorns Exchange, and Forge Global—claiming to offer access to company shares. The warning aims to protect investors from fraudulent transactions.
content: The company named Open Doors Partners, Unicorns Exchange, Pachamama Capital, Lionheart Ventures, Hiive, Forge Global, Sydecar and Upmarket as companies that are not authorized to provide access to buy or sell its shares.

zh.title: Anthropic警告投资者远离提供访问其股份的二级平台
zh.summary: Anthropic警告投资者避免使用八个未授权的二级平台——包括Open Doors Partners、Unicorns Exchange和Forge Global——这些平台声称提供对公司股份的访问权。该警告旨在保护投资者免受欺诈交易的影响。

title: Sam Altman says Elon Musk’s mind games were damaging OpenAI
summary: During testimony in Musk's lawsuit, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman claimed Musk's management style caused "huge damage" to the startup's culture, including forcing researcher rankings and culls. Altman argued Musk lacked understanding of how to lead a research organization.
content:
OpenAI CEO Sam Altman says Elon Musk did "huge damage" to the culture of the AI startup. During testimony as part of Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI, Altman said Musk required OpenAI president Greg Brockman and former chief scientist Ilya Sutskever to rank researchers by their accomplishments and "take a chainsaw through a bunch."
Altman conceded that this was the management style the Tesla CEO was known for, but that it was incompatible with his startup. "I don't think Mr. Musk understood how to run a good research lab," Altman testified when his lawyer, William Savitt, asked about the impact of Musk's departure from OpenAI on morale. "For a …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 山姆·奥特曼称埃隆·马斯克的心理战伤害了OpenAI文化
zh.summary: 在马斯克诉讼的证词中，OpenAI首席执行官山姆·奥特曼声称马斯克的管理风格对初创公司文化造成了"巨大伤害"，包括强制进行研究人员排名和裁员。奥特曼辩称马斯克缺乏对如何领导研究机构的理解。

title: Potholes cost cities millions: This company is using AI and trucks to fix them
summary: Samsara, a fleet management company, has developed an AI model to detect potholes and measure their deterioration rates. The technology offers cities a data-driven approach to prioritize and manage infrastructure repairs more efficiently.
content: Fleet management company Samsara has developed an AI model to detect different kinds of potholes and gauge how fast they're deteriorating.

zh.title: 坑洞每年花费城市数百万美元：这家公司正在用AI和卡车修复它们
zh.summary: 车队管理公司Samsara开发了一个AI模型来检测坑洞并测量其恶化速度。这项技术为城市提供了一种数据驱动的方法，可以更有效地优先安排和管理基础设施维修。

title: Report: Google and SpaceX in talks to put data centers into orbit
summary: Google and SpaceX are reportedly in talks to build orbital data centers for AI compute workloads, positioning space as a future hub for computational resources. Despite the ambitious vision, current space-based costs significantly exceed ground-based alternatives.
content: Google and SpaceX are in talks to build data centers in orbit, pitching space as the future home for AI compute, even as costs today remain far higher than on the ground.

zh.title: 报告：谷歌和SpaceX正在商谈将数据中心送上太空
zh.summary: 据报道，谷歌和SpaceX正在商谈建造用于AI计算工作负载的轨道数据中心，将太空定位为未来计算资源的枢纽。尽管目标宏大，但目前基于太空的成本远远超过地面方案。

title: eBay rejects GameStop's $56B offer: "Your proposal is neither credible nor attractive"
summary: eBay's board rejected GameStop's $56 billion acquisition proposal, stating it was "neither credible nor attractive" and questioning the retailer's ability to operate a much larger company. The rejection reflects investor skepticism about GameStop's financial viability for such a deal.
content: eBay board doubts GameStop's ability to buy and operate the much larger firm.

zh.title: eBay拒绝GameStop的560亿美元收购提议："你的提议既不可信也没有吸引力"
zh.summary: eBay董事会拒绝了GameStop的560亿美元收购提议，声称其"既不可信也没有吸引力"，并质疑这家零售商是否有能力运营一家规模更大的公司。这项拒绝反映了投资者对GameStop完成此类交易财务可行性的怀疑。

title: Everything Google announced at its Android Show, from Googlebooks to vibe-coded widgets
summary: At its Android event, Google unveiled AI-focused products including Googlebooks laptops, enhanced Gemini capabilities, vibe-coded widgets, Gemini integration in Chrome, and refreshed Android Auto. The announcements demonstrate Google's shift toward AI-first design across its ecosystem.
content: Google unveiled its new AI-first Googlebooks laptops, more agentic Gemini features, vibe-coded Android widgets, Gemini in Chrome, refreshed Android Auto, and more ahead of I/O.

zh.title: Google在Android展览上宣布的一切，从Googlebooks到气息编码小部件
zh.summary: 在其Android活动中，Google推出了以AI为中心的产品，包括Googlebooks笔记本电脑、增强的Gemini功能、气息编码小部件、Gemini在Chrome中的集成以及刷新的Android Auto。这些公告展示了Google在其整个生态系统中向AI优先设计的转变。

title: Google's Android-powered laptops are called Googlebooks, and they're coming this year
summary: Google has introduced Googlebooks, a new line of Android-based laptops designed as AI-native devices from the ground up. The company plans to release the devices in 2026.
content: Google has revealed its vision for the AI laptop of tomorrow.

zh.title: Google的Android驱动的笔记本电脑被称为Googlebooks，它们今年就会推出
zh.summary: Google推出了Googlebooks，一种新的基于Android的笔记本电脑系列，设计为从底层开始就是AI原生设备。该公司计划在2026年发布这些设备。

title: Android is getting a big AI overhaul in 2026
summary: Google has announced major AI enhancements planned for Android throughout 2026, positioning artificial intelligence as central to the platform's future. The updates represent a significant strategic pivot in Android's development roadmap.
content: Google has big plans for Android in 2026, and most of it is AI.

zh.title: Android 将在 2026 年进行大规模 AI 改革
zh.summary: 谷歌公布了 2026 年期间为 Android 计划的重大 AI 增强功能，将人工智能定位为平台未来的核心。这些更新代表了 Android 开发路线图中的重大战略转变。

title: The AI legal services industry is heating up. Anthropic is getting in on the action.
summary: Anthropic has launched a specialized suite of AI features designed to support law firms and legal professionals as the market for AI legal services expands. The move positions Anthropic to capture demand in the growing legal technology sector.
content: As the AI legal services industry heats up, Anthropic is launching its own suite of features designed to assist law firms.

zh.title: AI 法律服务行业升温，Anthropic 正在加入其中
zh.summary: Anthropic 推出了专门的 AI 功能套件，旨在支持律师事务所和法律专业人士，而 AI 法律服务市场正在扩大。此举使 Anthropic 能够捕捉不断增长的法律科技部门的需求。

title: Google adds Gemini-powered Dictation to Gboard, which could be bad news for dictation startups
summary: Google is adding Gemini-powered transcription to Gboard, initially rolling out to Samsung Galaxy and Google Pixel phones. The feature could disrupt specialized dictation startups that have dominated voice-to-text services.
content: Google's transcription feature will initially launch with Samsung Galaxy and Google Pixel phones

zh.title: Google 为 Gboard 添加 Gemini 听写功能，这对听写创业公司可能不是好消息
zh.summary: Google 正在为 Gboard 添加 Gemini 驱动的转录功能，首先在三星 Galaxy 和 Google Pixel 手机上推出。该功能可能会扰乱曾经主导语音转文本服务的专业听写创业公司。

title: Android adds a feature to stop you from doomscrolling
summary: Google has introduced Pause Point, an Android feature that adds a delay before launching designated apps to reduce compulsive scrolling behavior. The tool aims to help users break digital habits by introducing friction into accessing addictive applications.
content: Google’s new Android feature, Pause Point, forces you to wait before opening distracting apps in an effort to curb addictive scrolling habits.

zh.title: Android 推出功能阻止用户陷入无限滚动
zh.summary: 谷歌推出了暂停点功能，这是一项Android特性，在启动特定应用前添加延迟以减少强迫性滚动行为。该工具通过增加访问成瘾应用的摩擦力，帮助用户改变数字习惯。

title: Google unveils Googlebooks, a new line of AI-native laptops
summary: Google has unveiled Googlebooks, a new laptop line engineered specifically for AI and designed to integrate Gemini Intelligence from the ground up. The devices will launch in fall 2026 and emphasize personalized, proactive AI assistance.
content: The company says Googlebooks, which are launching this fall, are the first laptops designed from the ground up for Gemini Intelligence to offer personal and proactive help.

zh.title: 谷歌发布Googlebooks，全新AI原生笔记本电脑系列
zh.summary: 谷歌发布了Googlebooks，这是一款专为AI设计的新笔记本电脑系列，从根本上整合了Gemini智能。这些设备将在2026年秋季推出，强调个性化和主动式AI协助。

title: Google’s ‘Create My Widget’ feature will let you vibe code your own widgets
summary: Google is introducing Create My Widget, a feature allowing users to customize Android widgets using natural language prompts (vibe coding). The feature will initially debut on Samsung Galaxy and Google Pixel phones in summer 2026.
content: The new feature will first launch on the latest Samsung Galaxy and Google Pixel phones this summer.

zh.title: 谷歌"创建我的小部件"功能让你用自然语言编程创建小部件
zh.summary: 谷歌推出创建我的小部件功能，用户可以通过自然语言提示来自定义Android小部件。该功能将在2026年夏季率先在三星Galaxy和谷歌Pixel手机上推出。

title: Spotify’s launches a Wrapped-style recap of your entire listening history
summary: Spotify is launching a new "Wrapped"-style feature that provides a comprehensive recap of your entire listening history, including the total number of unique songs streamed since joining the platform.
content: Spotify's new feature will show you the number of unique songs that you listened to until now

zh.title: Spotify推出Wrapped风格的完整听歌历史回顾功能
zh.summary: Spotify正在推出一项新的"Wrapped"风格功能，提供您完整听歌历史的综合回顾，包括自加入该平台以来流播的独特歌曲总数。

title: Spotify’s latest ‘Wrapped’ covers your entire music history
summary: Spotify is celebrating its 20th anniversary with a new personalized experience showing users their complete music history, including their first song streamed, most-listened artist, and an all-time top 120 tracks playlist dating back to when they joined the service.
content:
Its like a “Wrapped” but for your entire Spotify listening history. | Image by Spotify / The Verge	

Spotify is celebrating its 20th anniversary by giving listeners a "fully personalized look at their entire music history." Starting today, Spotify mobile app users can access a new Wrapped-like experience that features "never-before-shared data" going back to when they first joined the service.
The "Spotify 20: Your Party of the Year(s)" experience will allow users to look back on their first day on Spotify, the first song they streamed, their most-listened to artist, and the total number of unique songs listened to since creating their account. Spotify is also putting together an All-Time Top Songs Playlist that includes the top 120 tracks …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Spotify最新的'Wrapped'涵盖您的整个音乐历史
zh.summary: Spotify正在庆祝其成立20周年，推出一项新的个性化体验，向用户展示其完整的音乐历史，包括首次流播的歌曲、最常听的艺术家以及从加入服务时起就能回溯的全部时间排名前120首歌曲播放列表。

title: AI voice startup Vapi hits $500M valuation after winning Amazon Ring over 40 rivals
summary: AI voice startup Vapi has reached a $500 million valuation after being selected by Amazon Ring over 40 competitors, with its enterprise business growing 10-fold since early 2025 as companies adopt AI agents for customer support and sales.
content: Vapi says its enterprise business has grown 10-fold since early 2025 as companies shift customer support and sales calls to AI agents.

zh.title: AI语音初创公司Vapi在击败40多个竞争对手赢得亚马逊Ring后达到5亿美元估值
zh.summary: AI语音初创公司Vapi在被亚马逊Ring从40多个竞争对手中选中后已达到5亿美元估值，随着公司采用AI代理进行客户支持和销售，其企业业务自2025年初以来增长了10倍。

title: Once again, SpaceX has set a new record for the tallest rocket ever built
summary: SpaceX has set a new record for the tallest rocket ever built, marking a key milestone in the development of a new Starship version.
content: SpaceX cleared an important milestone Monday on the road to launching a new version of Starship.

zh.title: SpaceX再次创造最高火箭纪录
zh.summary: SpaceX为新型Starship的开发树立了最高火箭纪录，标志着新Starship版本开发的关键里程碑。

title: How to watch Google’s Android Show: I/O Edition today
summary: Google is hosting the "Android Show: I/O Edition" today to announce major Android ecosystem updates and new Gemini features ahead of its main I/O developer conference next week.
content:
Google I/O is still a week away, but Google's big announcements kick off today with the "Android Show: I/O Edition," where it's expected to announce the major Android ecosystem highlights coming to its annual developer conference.
When the Android Show will happen and where you can watch it
Android Show: I/O Edition will be streaming live on YouTube and the Android website on Tuesday, May 12th at 10AM PT / 1PM ET. Based on last year's Android Show, we can expect the highlights to include a look at the next major Android update along with announcements about Gemini features on Android and potentially teases of some more forward-facing proje …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 如何观看谷歌今天的Android Show: I/O版本
zh.summary: 谷歌今天举办"Android Show: I/O版本"来宣布主要Android生态系统更新和新Gemini功能，为下周的主要I/O开发者大会做准备。

title: eBay rejects GameStop’s $56 billion acquisition bid
summary: eBay has officially rejected GameStop's $56 billion acquisition bid, with the board citing concerns about operational risks, financing credibility, and the long-term viability of a combined entity.
content:
No thank you, we’re good. | Photo by Brandon Bell/Getty Images	

eBay has officially rejected GameStop's offer to buy the online marketplace for $56 billion, citing concerns around "operational risks" and how the acquisition will be financed. In a letter to GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen on Tuesday, eBay's board of directors said it has "concluded that your proposal is neither credible nor attractive."
"We have taken into account such factors as 1) eBay's standalone prospects, 2) the uncertainty regarding your financing proposal, 3) the impact of your proposal on eBay's long-term growth and profitability, 4) the leverage, operational risks, and leadership structure of a combined entity, 5) the resulting implic …

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: eBay拒绝GameStop的560亿美元收购出价
zh.summary: eBay官方拒绝了GameStop的560亿美元收购出价，董事会表示对运营风险、融资可信度和合并后实体的长期可行性感到担忧。

title: Amazon launches 30-minute delivery across the U.S.
summary: Amazon has launched a 30-minute ultra-fast delivery option across the United States for groceries, household essentials, and other items, expanding its rapid delivery capabilities.
content: Amazon says its new ultra-fast delivery option brings groceries, household essentials, and other items to customers’ doors in 30 minutes.

zh.title: 亚马逊在美国推出30分钟快速配送
zh.summary: 亚马逊在美国推出了30分钟超快速配送选项，涵盖杂货、家居用品和其他商品，进一步扩展其快速配送能力。

title: These new Roombas are smaller and cheaper
summary: iRobot has introduced eight new lidar-based robot vacuums with improved features, significantly smaller sizes, and lower prices—some up to $270 cheaper—including enhanced suction power and new "hot spot mopping" capability.
content:
iRobot upgrades its lidar-based robot vacuum line with eight new models. | Image: iRobot	

iRobot has announced a new line of Roombas, a year after it debuted its first lidar-based robot vacuums. This week, it introduced eight robot vacuums that improve on its current lineup and feature lower prices, some up to £200 (about $270) cheaper. Key changes include higher suction power, a smaller overall size to better navigate your home, more models with roller mops, and the introduction of "hot spot mopping." 
iRobot filed for bankruptcy late last year, underwent a reboot, and is now owned by Shenzhen Picea Robotics, a Chinese original design manufacturer of robotic vacuums. The company says its new lineup is up to 25 percent smaller f …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 这些新款Roomba扫地机器人体积更小、价格更便宜
zh.summary: iRobot推出了八款新型激光雷达扫地机器人，具有改进的功能、明显更小的体积和更低的价格——某些型号便宜多达270美元——并配备增强的吸力和新的"热点拖地"功能。

title: Sony upgraded its wearable AC so it’s cooler and better at hugging your neck
summary: Sony released the Reon Pocket Pro Plus, a wearable personal air conditioner with 20% improved cooling performance and redesigned fit for discreet wear under clothing. Launching in Europe at €229, the device continues Sony's personal cooling product line first introduced for the 2020 Tokyo Olympics.
content:
The Reon Pocket Pro Plus delivers a 20 percent improvement in cooling performance over last year’s model. | Image: Sony	

Sony has announced a new version of the wearable personal air conditioner the company first revealed in 2019 ahead of the 2020 Tokyo Olympics. The latest version is an upgrade to last year's Pro model, and while the new Reon Pocket Pro Plus isn't a complete overhaul of the hardware, it comes with performance upgrades and design updates making it easier to wear discreetly under many kinds of shirts. It's launching in Europe and other markets today for €229/£199, or around $270. As with all the previous versions, Sony hasn't mentioned plans to bring it to the US.
Instead of simply blasting you with air like the Dyson HushJet Mini Cool, the Re …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 索尼升级了可穿戴空调，冷却效果更好，贴颈效果更舒适
zh.summary: 索尼发布了Reon Pocket Pro Plus，这是一款可穿戴个人空调设备，冷却性能提高了20%，并重新设计了贴合度以便在衣服下隐蔽佩戴。该设备在欧洲以€229的价格推出，是索尼个人冷却产品线的延续，该产品线最初是为2020年东京奥运会推出的。

title: Thinking Machines wants to build an AI that actually listens while it talks
summary: Thinking Machines is building an AI model that processes user input and generates responses simultaneously, departing from the sequential listen-then-respond pattern used by all current AI models. This approach aims to create more natural, phone-call-like conversations compared to traditional turn-based text exchanges.
content: Right now, every AI model you've ever used works the same way. You talk, it listens. It responds, you listen. Thinking Machines is trying to change that by building a model that processes your input and generates a response at the same time, so it's more like a phone call than a text chain.

zh.title: 思想机器公司想要打造一个边说边听的AI
zh.summary: 思想机器公司正在构建一个能够同时处理用户输入和生成回复的AI模型，这偏离了所有当前AI模型使用的顺序式"听-然后-响应"模式。这种方法旨在创造更自然的、类似电话的对话，与传统的轮流制文本交换相比。

title: Riding an AI rally, Robinhood preps second retail venture IPO
summary: Robinhood is filing confidentially for its second venture fund, targeting both growth-stage and early-stage startups. The filing reflects investor appetite for venture investments amid an AI-driven market rally.
content: Robinhood files confidentially for its second venture fund, this time targeting growth as well as early-stage startups.

zh.title: 乘AI热潮，罗宾汉准备第二只零售风险基金IPO
zh.summary: 罗宾汉正在秘密申报第二只风险基金，目标是成长期和初期初创公司。该申报反映了在AI驱动市场反弹中投资者对创投的热情。
